title: Belt Slot (Dynamic Lights Support)
description: Adds a dedicated belt utility slot for torches, totems, compasses, potions, spyglasses, and other supported items, with HUD, inventory, player rendering.
body:
# Belt Slot

Belt Slot adds one dedicated utility slot to the player for useful survival items.

Keep a torch, totem, compass, potion, spyglass, or other supported item on your belt instead of sacrificing your hotbar or offhand.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mcOBhkxyGFw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

- Dedicated belt utility slot
- Inventory integration
- HUD display
- Player model rendering
- Configurable supported items
- Tag-based modpack support
- Server-authoritative behavior

Belt Slot is designed to be lightweight, practical, and vanilla-friendly.

### Optional Dynamic Lights integration

If Dynamic Lights is present on both the client and server, Belt Slot automatically uses it for supported light-emitting belt items.



_P.S.
It does not try to replace your inventory or add a full trinket system.
It simply gives you one focused utility slot that feels natural in normal gameplay._
